summary: Tested TradeSafe payment gateway integration. Public endpoints (fee-breakdown, platform-settings, webhook) work correctly. Found CRITICAL duplicate endpoint definition bug causing 422 errors on /api/tradesafe/create-transaction. Frontend UI correctly shows R500 minimum and TradeSafe integration components.

critical.issue: DUPLICATE ENDPOINT DEFINITION at lines 2758 and 3013 in server.py. FastAPI uses the FIRST definition which requires {title, description, amount, buyer_email, seller_email} fields, but the CORRECT implementation at line 3013 only requires {transaction_id, fee_allocation}. This causes 422 Unprocessable Entity errors when using the simplified schema the frontend expects.
critical.fix: Remove the duplicate endpoint definition at lines 2749-2867 (including TradeSafeTransactionCreate class at line 2749) and keep only the implementation at lines 3002-3102

minor.issue: Some user documents have created_at as datetime object instead of ISO string, causing 500 errors on /api/auth/me when user model tries to parse
minor.fix: Add datetime serialization handling in User model or ensure all created_at fields are ISO strings

integration_issues.issue: Frontend calls POST /api/tradesafe/create-transaction with {transaction_id, fee_allocation} but gets 422 due to backend duplicate endpoint expecting different fields

passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/platform/settings - returns payment methods [EFT, CARD, OZOW]
✅ GET /api/tradesafe/fee-breakdown - calculates fees correctly for R1000
✅ GET /api/tradesafe/fee-breakdown - buyer pays all fees option
✅ GET /api/tradesafe/fee-breakdown - seller pays all fees option
✅ New Transaction page - shows R500 minimum text
✅ New Transaction page - item price input has min='500' attribute
✅ New Transaction page - fee allocation options available
✅ New Transaction page - delivery method options (Courier, Bank Deposit, Digital)
action_items: CRITICAL: Remove duplicate endpoint at /app/backend/server.py lines 2749-2867 (keep only the correct implementation at lines 3002-3102)
CRITICAL: Also remove the duplicate class 'TradeSafeTransactionCreate' defined at line 2749 (keep the one at line 3002)
MEDIUM: Fix datetime serialization for User.created_at field - ensure ISO string format

critical_code_review_comments.comment: DUPLICATE ENDPOINT: @api_router.post('/tradesafe/create-transaction') is defined TWICE. The first definition (lines 2758-2867) has different request schema and shadows the correct implementation at line 3013
Class 'TradeSafeTransactionCreate' is defined twice with different fields causing confusion

success_rate.backend: 74% (17/23 - 6 skipped due to duplicate endpoint bug)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (All payment pages and form validations work correctly)

seed_data_creation: Created test user for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: TradeSafe integration has a CRITICAL duplicate endpoint bug. POST /api/tradesafe/create-transaction returns 422 because there are TWO endpoint definitions at lines 2758 and 3013 in server.py. The first definition (2749-2867) expects {title, description, amount, buyer_email, seller_email} but the correct implementation (3002-3102) expects {transaction_id, fee_allocation}. Main agent needs to DELETE lines 2749-2867 entirely. All public endpoints work: fee-breakdown, platform-settings, webhook. Frontend UI is correctly implemented with proper data-testid attributes.

tradesafe_specific_notes.oauth_token_caching: Two implementations exist - one in server.py (line 2584) and one in tradesafe_service.py (line 48)
